pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in task.json description and enforced by export_result.sh OUTPUT_PATH variable.
Explicitly defined in task.json description as a '100x100 mm base plate'.
Explicitly defined in task.json description as 'extruded to 10 mm depth'.
Explicitly defined in task.json description as 'sketch a 6 mm diameter circle'.
Explicitly defined in task.json description as '25 mm spacing in both X and Y directions'.
Explicitly defined in task.json description as 'pattern this circle into a 4x4 grid'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to synthetically construct a 3D CAD model of an optical breadboard from scratch in SolveSpace. All parameters (100x100mm plate, 10mm depth, 6mm hole diameter, 4x4 grid, 25mm spacing) explicitly match the task description instructions. Note: The task is fundamentally broken for automated scoring due to its missing `verifier.py` script, which will cause the `verifier.py::verify_optical_breadboard_grid` success mode to fail, although the export script still successfully captures the output file state at the expected path.
